remarks: Beautifully Maintained Townhouse - Move-In Ready! Nestled in a desirable Cove neighborhood, this charming townhouse is ready for you. The unit features 2 spacious bedrooms and 1 full bathroom. The main level boasts an open-concept layout, seamlessly connecting the living room, eat-in kitchen, and dining area-perfect for everyday living and entertaining. Both bedrooms are generously sized and offer ample closet space. Conveniently located near the beach and just minutes from downtown Stamford, you'll enjoy easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment options. Don't miss this wonderful opportunity to own a move-in-ready home in a sought-after location!
